meta.title: Front Porch Web, LLC — Websites Built on Trust
meta.description: Front Porch Web builds custom, mobile-friendly websites for businesses, adoptive families, and student-athletes — honest prices, no surprises.

hero.headline: Beautiful websites for local businesses
hero.sub: Custom, mobile-friendly sites for businesses, adoptive families, and student-athletes — honest prices, no surprises.

values.title: Honest prices. No surprises.
values.body: Straightforward monthly pricing, published right on this page. No hidden fees.

values.title: Built custom for you
values.body: Every site is designed around your story — custom pages, your own domain, mobile-friendly on every device.

values.title: You approve every detail
values.body: You see a full preview before anything goes live. Nothing publishes until you're happy.

work.heading: Sites built for real people.
work.sub: Every site starts with a real story — a family, a local crew, a student with a goal.

cards.title: The Bennett Family
cards.description: A warm adoption profile for a loving Indianapolis family hoping to welcome a child home.
cards.imageAlt: The Bennett Family adoption profile website

cards.title: Fresh Cut Lawn Care
cards.description: A clean, conversion-focused site for an Indianapolis lawn care company.

cards.title: Hartman Plumbing
cards.description: A trust-building site for a 24/7 emergency plumbing and drain service.

cards.title: College Recruiting Profile
cards.description: A standout recruiting page for a student-athlete looking to get noticed by college coaches.

process.heading: Up and running in three easy steps.

steps.title: Fill out our questionnaire
steps.body: Answer a few quick questions and upload your photos. No tech experience needed — just tell us your story.

steps.title: We build your site
steps.body: We build a custom website with modern tools and techniques. You will see a preview before anything goes live.

steps.title: Review & launch
steps.body: You approve every detail. When you are happy, we publish and make sure everything runs fast and reliably.

about.heading: Websites Built on Trust
about.photoAlt: Sean, founder of Front Porch Web
about.body: Hi, I am Sean, a high school junior studying aviation and someone who loves learning about flight and technology. Being part of an adoptive family, I have heard about how much time and effort my mom put into building a website as we were waiting to grow our family. Hearing this story, along with my own love of technology, inspired me to create a platform where families and small organizations can more easily and economically share stories online.

cta.heading: Ready to tell your story?
cta.body: Fill out the questionnaire, upload your photos, and see a full preview before anything goes live.
